feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Deadly Premonition
entry.content: Just beat pic related and I want to talk about it. Note that I'm going to spoil the fuck out of the entire game so if you haven't somehow played this decade old game yet don't click this thread. No seriously, it's a great game and I'd hate to be the one to ruin it for you. >TL;DR: Proof that a bunch of negatives can make a positive when added together. I would argue not a single component works well in this game. The horror is there but it's never scary thanks to the enemies being piss-weak, inc

entry.content: life has been better, i think thats fair to say

entry.title: /b/ Random: CHAPTER TWO GOD COMES TO MEET MAN 50 By natural reason man can know God with cer…
entry.content: CHAPTER TWO GOD COMES TO MEET MAN 50 By natural reason man can know God with certainty, on the basis of his works. But there is another order of knowledge, which man cannot possibly arrive at by his own powers: the order of divine Revelation.1 Through an utterly free decision, God has revealed himself and given himself to man. This he does by revealing the mystery, his plan of loving goodness, formed from all eternity in Christ, for the benefit of all men. God has fully revealed this plan by sen

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: We went from "gaming is healing" to "gaming is too healthy" way too quick.
entry.content: We went from "gaming is healing" to "gaming is too healthy" way too quick.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >a new game is announced in a series you like during 1995 - 2010 >genuine excite…
entry.content: >a new game is announced in a series you like during 1995 - 2010 >genuine excitement and hype >a new game or remake is announced in a series you like during 2011 - today >feelings of anxiety and dread It's wild that there are entire generations of gamers that will never experience the first feel It's wild that we'll never experience the first feel again

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Sons of Anarchy
entry.content: This was good for like three seasons and then it flies off into meaningless shock value bullshit. I'm on S05e12 and almost every episode ends in a contrived fakeout cliffhanger and they keep introducing antagonists that cannot act to save their lives and come off as cringe. I wish it had ended sooner with some sort of real purpose to the characters. Did the writers get bored not expecting the show to run so long or what the fuck happened?

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: a day in the life of me
entry.content: >pulls loaded gun to my head >"goodbye cruel world" >pulls trigger >wake up mid bang (its 5pm btw) >"ah.. just a dream again.. soon ill do it foreal" >pull out phone with 0 notifications while still in bed >browse twitter reels for like an hour and a half >all slop garbage because its generally what i actually watch so the algorithm feeds me more of it >open instagram and do the same, watch reels slop for like an hour >finally get out of bed >walk a few steps to my pc with linux on it >ah.. time

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Adobe Director / Macromedia Director
entry.content: Hello, everyone! A short preamble. I got interested in a 2009 game Solium Infernum made entirely in Adobe Director. To better understand its code and potentially to mod its graphic assets, I spent some time searching for decompilers, and found two great tools: - https://github.com/ProjectorRays/Pr ojectorRays/releases which produces readable .dir files from protected Director .cxt format which allowed me to access the game code in GameEngine.cxt; - https://github.com/n0samu/DirectorC astRipper/r

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I saved a web page using Firefox just a few minutes ago. I chose the "web page, …
entry.content: I saved a web page using Firefox just a few minutes ago. I chose the "web page, complete" option, so in addition to creating a .html file on my hard drive, it created a folder with the associated .css and .js files. When I tried to open the local .html file though, I saw unstyled content and the scripting was broken. I checked the header inside the .html file but the links to the .js and .css files were changed from the original web version and seem to be correct to my local directory. Could som

entry.title: /mu/ Music: The Ye Question
entry.content: So we all know at this point he's essentially turned himself into more of a lolcow than musician/rapper/producer etc and it's also likely his brain is probably fried permanently at least to a Brian Wilson-level if not halfway to Syd Barret, but taking all that into account do you think he still has one more 10/10 masterpiece left in him? And before any of the /pol/bots come in here and say "hurr durr not music old /mu/ hated Kanye" that's a lie and you know it. Old /mu/ loved MBDTF all the way u

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Offshore Data Centres
entry.content: Offshore Data Centres (ODCs) are emerging as a sustainable alternative to terrestrial infrastructure, leveraging ocean-based platforms like floating barges and gravity-based structures for high-performance computing. By utilizing the sea as an infinite heat sink for passive cooling, these facilities significantly reduce energy overheads and offer solutions to land-scarcity and power-grid bottlenecks, though they require robust engineering to manage marine environmental factors. For a deeper look

entry.title: /news/ News: Ukraine Aims to Fill Up to Half of Assault Infantry Positions With Foreign Recruits
entry.content: https://www.kyivpost.com/post/78073 https://archive.md/uV4yu What to know: Ukraine is seeking to dramatically expand the role of foreign recruits in its military, with Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov saying the government aims for foreigners to fill up to half of all assault and infantry positions. Ukraine plans to open its military recruitment system to foreign nationals and aims to have foreigners fill as many as half of all assault and infantry positions in its armed forces, Defense Ministe

entry.title: /mu/ Music: NEW GROUPER (MAYBE)
entry.content: >https://youtube.com/playlist?list= OLAK5uy_ni-h5XDEZ0-SlBA1sRSXm9WHYRW FCGA5g is this actually new grouper? it sounds nothing like her past work but its produced in a way that feels like liz + the cover feels like something she'd pick. I can't find its existence anywhere else, including on other streaming services. Youtube sometimes bugs out and if two artists have the same name it'll confuse them but this kinda seems like Grouper just a massive departure (almost clairo'esque bedroom pop).

entry.content: Queen rose of the rosebud garden of girls, Come hither, the dances are done, In gloss of satin and glimmer of pearls, Queen lily and rose in one; Shine out, little head, sunning over with curls, To the flowers, and be their sun. Your fortune: Average Luck

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Applying Paul Fussell’s class analysis (from his seminal 1983 book Class: A Guid…
entry.content: Applying Paul Fussell’s class analysis (from his seminal 1983 book Class: A Guide Through the American Status System) to the evolution of German World War II armor (Panzer I to Panzer VI) reveals an unspoken, rigid social hierarchy. In Fussell’s universe, class is not merely about money, but about taste, proportion, anxiety, over-engineering, and the desperate desire to avoid looking middle-class.Here is the definitive social registry of the Panzerwaffe,

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Why do gamers care so much that a game feels like a "real RPG"?
entry.content: I just don't get why it's such a big deal if a game feels like a real RPG or not. I myself have never actually sat down and played a tabletop game, but I have watched examples of them, and it seems like its just a bunch of people sitting around, doing improv and playing pretend, like a play or something. Sure I guess this involves a lot of "choice" but to me it seems less like a game and more like a drama exercise or something. I don't get why gamers are just so hung up on RPGs actually being "r

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Remigration is the compromise
entry.content: When I close my eyes I have visions of armed white men leading brown men at gunpoint to the beaches of Europe, there they're given a simple command: swim. The Abduls and Ahmeds will look around at each other in disbelief, they will complain and protest until a single shot cracks overhead. With trepidation they approach the waterline, grey sky overhead, the cold waves licking at their feet. They don't know how to swim, another warning shot and they are neck deep in the water. Then the firing begi

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Jai is the no-coder language
entry.content: From today onwards I officially became a Blow hater. I sent an email to Theckla asking to join Jai's closed beta. I explained that I work with networking in a Telecom company and said that I would like to study the language a little and do a demo at my company. I currently have the pirated compiler, but I can't present a pirated compiler in my company, and of course I didn't mentioned that on the email. I explained some of our constraints and also talked about some features of the language that

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Making an AI / Macro to create images for me
entry.content: /g/, I want to know how easy it is to have my PC automatically perform some basic inputs Simply put, I make money creating images on NovelAI, but it is annoying manually clicking the generate button and changing the prompt. I use cookie cutter prompts I merely change depending on what part of the image set I am on. So. How hard would it be to set up a macro or some sort of AI agent that automatically does this for me? Click generate, generate again, change prompt, generate, stop after 100x image

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I mean this in the most unironic and non race bait way, do black people even fuc…
entry.content: I mean this in the most unironic and non race bait way, do black people even fucking listen to Rap shit? It feels like an actual fucking psyop, you look up who the majority of listeners are and who go to rap festivals like rolling loud or Summer Smash, it's all wealthy white people? What gives?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: After spending a few months in Shenzhen, I don't understand why the West is fall…
entry.content: After spending a few months in Shenzhen, I don't understand why the West is falling so far behind China's tech ecosystem. In Shenzhen, I can order anything and have it delivered by drone to a dropoff point pretty much immediately. Why isn't this available in US cities? It makes no sense to me. There's so much fucking money lying on the ground for anyone who just copies Chinese tech in the West.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /trash/ Pokemon Drawthread
entry.content: Tengatink Edition Pokemon OCs and Fakemons (actual fakemons please like fusions and clovermons) are welcome too >How do I request? •Start your post with "requesting" or "/r/". •Provide descriptions, links, and image references in a single post. •Don't spam or bump your requests. •Check the dropbox or booru to see if your request was done. •Request edits in the thread for edits and colorings: >>>/trash/lineart >What if I want to start drawing? •Check these resources for beginners:https://pastebin

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Remember that VeraCrypt may fail to boot into Windows after (during?) this month…
entry.content: Remember that VeraCrypt may fail to boot into Windows after (during?) this month June 2026 because of MS signing issue. If you're running Windows encrypted with VeraCrypt it's a good idea to read through this thread to see if you need to update anything. And backup your stuff of course, just in case. https://sourceforge.net/p/veracrypt /discussion/general/thread/9620d7a4 b3/ I have not seen much news coverage about this and had almost forgotten about it myself, so consider this a friendly remind
